title: Remote help works during tab screen share
description:
While a tab is shared via getDisplayMedia, Chrome blocks native UI like window.prompt and select dropdowns — so theme changes and workspace rename appeared broken until sharing ended. CaptureController keeps focus on the shared tab; rename uses a modal; theme cycles on click during capture. Admin remote control now sends full mouse sequences including double-click.

Who is affected: remote help on pipeshare.live.
changeLog: CaptureController keeps focus on the shared portal tab after getDisplayMedia.
Workspace tab rename uses in-app modal instead of window.prompt (blocked during capture).
Theme picker cycles profiles on click while tab share is active.
Admin remote sends mousedown/move/up/click/dblclick for drag and double-click actions.
Support chat header icons fixed; minimized chat shows Support tab pill.
